raw_response_text:
<explanation>The target image features pink/purple multi-petaled star-shaped flowers with prominent central floral structures, which matches the visual characteristics of the examples labeled 81 (clematis flowers). It does not match the yellow iris flower form associated with label 14.</explanation>
<response>81</response>
